habitat: East Asia; culinary herb in Japan, Korea, Vietnam, China.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary herb (sushi garnish, kimchi, oils); traditional East Asian medicinal food uses vary by cultivar.
traditionalUsesDe: Küchenkraut (Sushi, Kimchi, Öle); traditionelle ostasiatische Nutzungen je nach Sorte.
activeCompounds: Essential oil (perillaldehyde chemotypes), rosmarinic acid, anthocyanins (red forms)
preparation: Fresh leaves; seed oil; pickled leaves.
cautions: Rare pulmonary issues linked to long high intake of seed oil in animals—normal culinary use typical.
historicalNotes: Red and green chemotypes shape regional cuisines.
habitatDe: Ostasien; kulinarisch Kraut in Japan, Korea, Vietnam, China.
activeCompoundsDe: Ätherisches Öl (perillaldehyde chemotypes), rosmarinic acid, anthocyanins (red forms)
preparationDe: Frisch Blätter; Samen Öl; pickled Blätter.
cautionsDe: Selten pulmonary issues linked zu long high intake von Samen Öl in animals—normal kulinarische Verwendung typical.
historicalNotesDe: Red und green chemotypes shape regional cuisines.
